shots.title: review-tier guard writes review-state.json on plan detection
shots.notes: Imported canonical ReviewState + saveReviewState from review-state.ts, removed local duplicate interface. Writes state after sprint-state block, before return.

shots.title: compaction guard includes review + sprint phase in handoff
shots.notes: Extended HandoffData with review (tier, rounds) and sprint_phase. Best-effort reads from .slope/ files.

shots.title: workflow-gate message includes actionable recovery steps
shots.notes: Replaced single-line blockReason with multi-line actionable instructions including exact commands.

shots.title: Add compaction drops pending gates to common-issues
worktree-merge guard blocks --delete-branch in worktrees
shots.notes: New guard: PreToolUse on Bash, detects gh pr merge --delete-branch in worktree, blocks with corrected command. Registered in GUARD_DEFINITIONS + handler map. 6 unit tests.

conditions: Worktree isolation required for edits (hook blocked main repo)
PR #117 merged via first attempt but --delete-branch caused exit 1 — motivated S60-5
yardage_book_updates: gh pr merge --delete-branch fails in worktrees — merge succeeds but exit code 1 from local branch cleanup
Advisory guard context is lost on compaction — disk state is the only reliable enforcement mechanism
course_management_notes: All 5 tickets clean — no hazards, no penalties
S60-5 was unplanned but directly motivated by hitting the bug during S60-1 merge
Guard count assertion in guard.test.ts needs updating when adding GUARD_DEFINITIONS entries
slope_factors: All wedge/putter except S60-5 (short_iron for new guard file)
